Uses of Record Class
sc.fiji.snt.analysis.curation.PlausibilityCheck.Measurements

Packages that use PlausibilityCheck.Measurements
Package
Description
sc.fiji.snt.analysis.curation
Classes for curation of reconstructions, as implemented by the "Curation Assistant".

  • Uses of PlausibilityCheck.Measurements in sc.fiji.snt.analysis.curation

    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final PlausibilityCheck.Measurements
    PlausibilityCheck.Measurements.EMPTY
    Sentinel returned when no measurements can be produced.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    PlausibilityCheck.Measurements
    PlausibilityCheck.BoundaryProximity.measure(Collection<Path> paths)
     
    PlausibilityCheck.Measurements
    PlausibilityCheck.BranchAngle.measure(Collection<Path> paths)
     
    PlausibilityCheck.Measurements
    PlausibilityCheck.BundledPaths.measure(Collection<Path> paths)
    The measurement is each detected proximity-run's median angle: the histogram lets the user see how their maxParallelAngleDeg sits in the angle distribution.
    PlausibilityCheck.Measurements
    PlausibilityCheck.Crossovers.measure(Collection<Path> paths)
    Sweeps CrossoverFinder at 5x the current proximity threshold so the histogram shows context around the cutoff, not just flagged events.
    PlausibilityCheck.Measurements
    PlausibilityCheck.DeepCheck.measure(Collection<Path> paths)
    Computes the full distribution of this check's metric across paths, without applying the warning threshold.
    PlausibilityCheck.Measurements
    PlausibilityCheck.DirectionContinuity.measure(Collection<Path> paths)
     
    PlausibilityCheck.Measurements
    PlausibilityCheck.IntensityValley.measure(Collection<Path> paths)
     
    PlausibilityCheck.Measurements
    PlausibilityCheck.InterForkDistance.measure(Collection<Path> paths)
     
    PlausibilityCheck.Measurements
    PlausibilityCheck.InvalidRadius.measure(Collection<Path> paths)
     
    PlausibilityCheck.Measurements
    PlausibilityCheck.LiveCheck.measure(Collection<Path> paths)
    Computes the full distribution of this check's metric across paths, without applying the warning threshold.
    PlausibilityCheck.Measurements
    PlausibilityCheck.RadiusContinuity.measure(Collection<Path> paths)
     
    PlausibilityCheck.Measurements
    PlausibilityCheck.RadiusJumps.measure(Collection<Path> paths)
     
    PlausibilityCheck.Measurements
    PlausibilityCheck.RadiusMonotonicity.measure(Collection<Path> paths)
    Collects every monotonic-increase run of length >= 2 (regardless of the current minIncreasingRun threshold) so the histogram shows the full distribution of run lengths in the reconstruction.
    PlausibilityCheck.Measurements
    PlausibilityCheck.SignalQuality.measure(Collection<Path> paths)
     
    PlausibilityCheck.Measurements
    PlausibilityCheck.SomaDistance.measure(Collection<Path> paths)
    Measures the start-to-nearest-reference distance for every path's first node.
    PlausibilityCheck.Measurements
    PlausibilityCheck.TerminalBranchLength.measure(Collection<Path> paths)
     
    PlausibilityCheck.Measurements
    PlausibilityCheck.TerminalNearAncestor.measure(Collection<Path> paths)
     
    PlausibilityCheck.Measurements
    PlausibilityCheck.TortuosityConsistency.measure(Collection<Path> paths)
     
    PlausibilityCheck.Measurements
    PlausibilityCheck.UncertainTerminal.measure(Collection<Path> paths)
     
    PlausibilityCheck.Measurements
    PlausibilityCheck.ZExtentRatio.measure(Collection<Path> paths)
     
    PlausibilityCheck.Measurements
    PlausibilityMonitor.measure(PlausibilityCheck.DeepCheck deepCheck, Collection<Path> paths)
    Collects the raw distribution of deepCheck's metric across paths without applying its warning threshold.
    PlausibilityCheck.Measurements
    PlausibilityMonitor.measure(PlausibilityCheck.LiveCheck liveCheck, Collection<Path> paths)
    Collects the raw distribution of liveCheck's metric across paths without applying its warning threshold.
